name: Festive Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 28 Ounces Can Whole Tomatoes, cut up (undrained)
recipeInstructions:
In a large pan, combine sausage, onion, and garlic. Cook until sausage is no longer pink, stirring occasionally; drain. Stir in the rest of the ingredients up through pepper. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
In a medium bowl blend ricotta, egg, and parsley.
Layer as follows:
meat sauce
3 noodles
1/3 meat sauce
1/2 ricotta
1/2 mozzarella
1/3 Parmesan
3 noodles
1/3 meat sauce
1/2 ricotta
1/2 mozzarella
1/3 Parmesan
3 noodles
1/3 meat sauce
1/3 Parmesan
Bake for one hour in a preheated 375 degree oven.
